file_insights.changes: Added BranchStatus enum with three states: ACTIVE, INACTIVE, SUSPENDED for branch lifecycle management
file_insights.significance: Core enum definition required for branch status tracking

file_insights.changes: Added comprehensive Branch model with hierarchical support (parentId, children relations), 13 fields, 4 strategic indexes, and relations to Organization, Menu, Table, Order models
file_insights.significance: Central data model enabling multi-location management with parent-child branch relationships

file_insights.changes: Added branchId optional field to Menu model with relation to Branch and corresponding index
Added branchId optional field to both Table and Order models with indexes and relations to Branch
file_insights.significance: Links orders and tables to specific branches for multi-location tracking

file_insights.changes: Created comprehensive REST controller with 22+ endpoints covering list, read, create, update, delete, settings management, status changes, and hierarchy operations
file_insights.significance: Primary HTTP interface for branch operations with proper authorization decorators

file_insights.changes: Implemented service layer with business logic for CRUD, validation, hierarchy traversal, and settings management
file_insights.significance: Core business logic layer handling branch operations

file_insights.changes: Created data access layer with pagination support, filtering, indexing, and relationship eager loading
file_insights.significance: Database abstraction layer optimizing queries with strategic indexes

file_insights.changes: Defined Zod validation schemas for all request/response types with comprehensive field validation
Created complete TypeScript type definitions for Branch, request/response DTOs, and pagination
Configured routing-controllers setup with dependency injection and module integration
file_insights.significance: Route registration and DI container setup

file_insights.changes: Implemented NestJS/tsyringe module with providers registration for Service and Repository
file_insights.significance: Module composition and dependency injection configuration

file_insights.changes: Created module manifest with metadata including version, name, dependencies, and feature flags
Created barrel export file for public module exports
file_insights.significance: Module boundary definition and API surface

patterns_discovered.description: Branch model uses self-referencing relations (parentId → parent, children[]) enabling tree structures for organizational hierarchies
patterns_discovered.evidence: Branch model with 'BranchHierarchy' named relation and parentId field

patterns_discovered.description: Prisma schema split across base.prisma (enums), core.prisma (main models), menu.prisma, order.prisma for logical separation of concerns
patterns_discovered.evidence: Four separate schema files with clear domain boundaries

patterns_discovered.description: All models include deletedAt field for logical deletion without physical removal
patterns_discovered.evidence: deletedAt DateTime? field in Branch and indexed for filtering

patterns_discovered.description: Multiple composite and single-field indexes on organizationId, status, and hierarchical fields for query optimization
branchId fields are optional across Menu, Table, Order allowing both branch-scoped and organization-scoped resources
patterns_discovered.evidence: branchId String? in Menu, Table, Order with nullable relations

patterns_discovered.description: Clear separation between Controller (HTTP), Service (business logic), Repository (data access), Schema (validation), Types (type safety)
patterns_discovered.evidence: Five distinct layer files with single responsibility each

patterns_discovered.description: Extensive JSDoc comments on controller methods with @route, @access, @example blocks following API_CONTRACTS.md specification
patterns_discovered.evidence: 553+ line controller with detailed docstrings on each endpoint

patterns_discovered.description: Fine-grained permission checks using @Authorized decorator with specific permission strings (branch.read, branch.create, branch.settings.read, etc.)
patterns_discovered.evidence: Authorization decorators on all endpoints with permission scopes

patterns_discovered.description: Settings field uses Json type for flexible configuration storage without additional tables
All entities include id (cuid), timestamps (createdAt, updatedAt), soft delete (deletedAt), organization relation
patterns_discovered.evidence: Consistent field naming and types across all models

gotchas_discovered.description: branchId fields are nullable on Menu, Table, Order. This creates implicit query patterns: resources can belong to org-level OR branch-level. Queries must handle both cases.
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Repository layer should provide helper methods for branch-filtered queries

gotchas_discovered.description: getHierarchy() endpoint potentially loads entire tree for large organizations. No pagination on hierarchy endpoints could cause memory issues.
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Consider depth limits or recursive query optimization in repository

gotchas_discovered.description: Self-referencing Branch relation allows cycles (A→B→C→A). No constraint prevents setting parentId to itself or descendant.
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Service layer must validate parentId is not in descendant chain before updates

gotchas_discovered.description: Deleting a parent branch doesn't cascade deletion logic to children. Orphaned branches would remain with valid parentId to deleted parent.
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Consider cascade behavior: delete children, reparent, or prevent deletion if children exist

gotchas_discovered.description: isMain boolean field allows multiple 'main' branches if not enforced in service. No unique constraint on (organizationId, isMain=true).
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Service create/update must ensure only one main branch per organization

gotchas_discovered.description: BranchStatus has three values but no business logic prevents invalid state transitions (e.g., SUSPENDED → ACTIVE without approval).
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Service should define valid state transition rules

gotchas_discovered.description: branchCode is unique per organization but branch names are not. Two branches in same org can have identical names.
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Consider adding unique constraint on (organizationId, name) if needed

gotchas_discovered.description: Branch deletion depends on no cascading deletes, but Order/Menu/Table records remain if branch is deleted. Foreign key constraint would prevent deletion.
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Must delete/reassign dependent records before branch deletion

approach_outcome.summary: Complete implementation of Branch module with database schema, REST API layer, business logic, validation, and type safety. Module provides multi-location management with hierarchical structure.
scope_achieved: Database schema with Branch model and enums across 4 Prisma files
REST controller with 22+ endpoints (list, get, create, update, delete, settings, status, hierarchy operations)
Service layer with business logic and validation
Repository layer with pagination, filtering, and optimization indexes
Zod validation schemas for all DTOs
approach_outcome.technical_quality: High - Follows established patterns from codebase (layered architecture, RBAC, soft deletes, strategic indexing, comprehensive documentation)

recommendations.recommendation: Implement circular hierarchy prevention in BranchService.update() - validate parentId is not current branch ID or any descendant ID before updating
recommendations.rationale: Prevents infinite recursion in hierarchy traversal operations

recommendations.recommendation: Add main branch enforcement - ensure only one isMain=true per organization, automatically unset isMain on other branches when creating/updating a new main branch
recommendations.rationale: Prevents multiple main branches leading to ambiguous references

recommendations.recommendation: Define and implement branch deletion strategy - either cascade to children/orders/tables, reparent children to parent, or prevent deletion if dependents exist
recommendations.rationale: Prevents orphaned branches and broken foreign key references

recommendations.recommendation: Add depth limit or lazy-loading to getHierarchy() endpoint - consider pagination or depth parameter to prevent loading entire tree
recommendations.rationale: Large organizations with deep hierarchies could experience memory/performance issues

recommendations.recommendation: Add batch operations endpoint (POST /branches/bulk) for creating multiple branches with same parent, useful for initial multi-location setup
recommendations.rationale: Improves API usability for bulk operations

recommendations.recommendation: Add name uniqueness constraint validation at service layer if required by business rules - currently two branches can share same name
recommendations.rationale: Improves data quality if business requires unique branch names per organization

recommendations.recommendation: Add unit tests for hierarchy operations (getHierarchy, getChildren) and state transition validation (status changes)
recommendations.rationale: Complex business logic requires comprehensive test coverage

recommendations.recommendation: Document state transition rules for BranchStatus (when transitions are allowed, business rules, approval workflows if any)
recommendations.rationale: Clarifies expected behavior for status management

recommendations.recommendation: Consider adding branch metadata fields (timezone, currency, locale) to support multi-region deployments
recommendations.rationale: Enables region-specific configurations without additional tables
